body_errors.note: Printed text at VI 1 has Βασιλεῖς without circumflex on final syllable; transcript accent differs.
Printed text in v.9 reads ἐφίσταται, not ἐφίσταται? Actually body transcript has ἐφίσταται? No body error here.

apparatus_errors.note: Apparatus omits the lemma entry 'VI 1 βασιλεις ...' present on the page between lines 23 and 2.
In that omitted apparatus entry, the page has 'βασιλευς/βασιλεις' variant for VI 1; transcript lacks it entirely.
Apparatus line 10 on page reads εὑρίσκουσιν, but transcript has εὑρήσουσιν from body instead.
Apparatus addition at line 12 on page reads ευρισκεται, but transcript has ευρισκεται? if matching, no error.

note: Body is very accurate overall, but the apparatus has a significant omission and at least one wrong word copied from the body.
